reasoning: Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick explicitly disavowed the Project 2025 plan to break up NOAA during his January 2025 confirmation hearings. While the Trump administration and DOGE have instituted massive budget cuts and fired up to 20% of NOAA staff by March 2025, 'breaking up' a major federal agency structurally would require an act of Congress or a sweeping executive reorganization plan, neither of which has been initiated as of May 15, 2025. The Keep_Track tracker distinguishes between 'in progress' and 'complete.' Given that such an objective involves complex administrative and statutory hurdles, it is nearly impossible for it to be structurally completed and marked as 'complete' in the tracker within the next 45 days (before July 1, 2025).
